description.zh: Victor42的小玩意：我工作与生活中遇会遇到一些问题，有时自己动手做个工具就能满足需求，或许这些小玩意你也用得上。
description.en: Victor42's Gadgets: Tools I've built to solve real-world problems. Maybe you'll find them handy too.

bio.zh: 科学、纪录片、博物馆爱好者；Excel狂魔；蹩脚开发者；UI/UX设计师；生活观察者
bio.en: Science/documentary/museum enthusiast, Excel weirdo, Underdog developer, UI/UX designer, Life witness

description.zh: 一款浏览器插件，轻松迁移歌单，在主流音乐平台间来去自如。
description.en: A browser extension for hassle-free playlist migration across all major music streaming platforms.

description.zh: 提取携程酒店详情页信息，支持多酒店对比，一键导出 Excel。
description.en: Extract Ctrip hotel data for side-by-side comparison and export to Excel with a single click.

description.zh: 独立的可插拔式记忆系统，能在 Claude Code/Manus/Minimax/Jules 等多种 Agent 产品中加载，谁加载，谁就变成它。
description.en: A pluggable memory system for AI Agents. Whoever loads it, inherits its identity and context.

name.zh: 谷歌 AI Studio 助手

description.zh: 自动设置 Google AI Studio 的系统提示词，新对话自动填入，外加快捷键和字号大小设置。
description.en: Power up Google AI Studio with persistent system prompts, auto-fill for new chats, custom shortcuts, and adjustable font sizes.

description.zh: 自动批量更新 NotebookLM 中的 Google Drive 资料，一键同步所有 Docs/Sheets/Slides 最新内容。
description.en: Keep NotebookLM in sync with Google Drive. Batch-update your Docs, Sheets, and Slides with a single click.

description.zh: 一份详细的AI插画批量生成手册，包含模型训练、ComfyUI工作流、多维表、Python代码、Photoshop改图技巧等。
description.en: A deep-dive manual for batch AI illustration, covering model training, ComfyUI workflows, Python automation, and Photoshop retouching.

description.zh: 自制一些Excel模板，用于计算出门时间、医院排队、家庭现金流等，会持续补充新品。毕竟，我可是Excel狂魔啊。
description.en: A collection of Excel templates for life's logistics—departure times, hospital queues, and family finance. More coming soon from an unrepentant Excel nerd.

description.zh: 自制自用的PPT模板，包含深浅两色。虽然不能拿去开发布会，但好在结构清晰布局丰富，日常内部分享、汇报是够够的了。
description.en: Personal PPT templates in light and dark modes. Structured and versatile layouts designed for clear internal reporting and sharing.

description.zh: 社交媒体发布利器，智能替换文本中的违禁词，避免限流。
description.en: The ultimate social media wingman. Intelligently swaps out 'sensitive' words to keep your posts from being shadowbanned.

description.zh: 面对陌生的设备，帮你解决"画布该设成多大"的问题。
description.en: Stop guessing canvas sizes for new devices. Get the right UI dimensions instantly.

description.zh: 出国旅行规划过程中，了解到了世界各地插座的不同标准，顺手做了个科普网站，方便有国际旅行计划的朋友参考。
description.en: An accidental expert's guide to global power standards. Built while planning a trip to help fellow world travelers.

description.zh: 自用的 Google Apps Script 工具集：日历监控、邮件归档、文件清理、表格操作等，还附带一套完整的RSS每日新闻采集和AI总结系统。
description.en: My Swiss Army knife for Google Apps Script: automates calendar, email, and files, plus an AI-powered RSS news digest.

name.zh: 自用软件一键安装系统

description.zh: 像技术人员一样装软件。拿到新电脑，打开黑漆漆的命令行，一行命令，回车，自用软件库就咔咔装好了。可自主维护和自动生成软件清单，作为长期资产。
description.en: Setup your new machine like a pro. A single command installs your entire software stack automatically. Fully maintainable as a long-term asset.

description.zh: 结合Excel的数据处理能力和PS灵活的图片编辑，用Python作为桥梁，从Excel取内容，填到PS的模板文件里，快速全自动生成大量图片。
description.en: Automate image production by bridging Excel and Photoshop. Uses Python to pump data into PS templates for high-speed batch exports.

name.zh: 浏览器脚本一键打包成插件

description.zh: 把浏览器脚本打包成浏览器扩展，充分利用应用市场的分发能力，让脚本安装和使用更方便。
description.en: Turn your userscripts into full browser extensions. Leverage the web store for seamless distribution and easier updates.

description.zh: 自制的ComfyUI工作流，日常工作首选，文生图、图像混合、风格迁移、风格探索、局部重绘、扩图、重新打光都能胜任。
description.en: My daily-driver ComfyUI workflow. A versatile Swiss Army knife for text-to-image, style exploration, inpainting, and relighting.

description.zh: 能把小图高清放大的ComfyUI工作流，利用AI想象出模糊图像中的缺失细节。
description.en: High-fidelity upscaling in ComfyUI. Leverages AI to 'hallucinate' crisp details back into low-res or blurry images.

description.zh: 在瓴羊认证考个证，发现它模拟考只保留最近5次考试记录。做了个脚本，考完可以把全部答题记录导出成表格，便于分析错题和制作错题集。
description.en: Hack your way to certification. Lingyang's mock exams only show the last 5 attempts, so I built a script to export your full history for deep error analysis.

description.zh: 可以把独立设计的一系列单页转成骑马钉双页。它能找到对应的每两张单页，按印刷所需顺序拼合起来。并可以方便地进一步转成单个PDF文件。
description.en: Prep for print with ease. Automatically reorders single pages into saddle-stitched pairs, ready for double-sided printing and PDF export.

description.zh: PS经常用于批量制作banner图，结合画板和生成图像资源功能，效率奇高。这就需要按顺序给大量画板重命名。自己写了个PS脚本，一键搞定。
description.en: Streamline batch banner exports in PS. Automatically renames dozens of artboards sequentially to save you from naming headaches.

description.zh: 不画圆也可以得出圆周率？这是个很有意思的数学和统计学问题。写了一个小程序模拟实验过程，亲自验证了一下。
description.en: Calculating Pi without circles? Explore the fascinating world of Buffon's Needle with this interactive statistical simulation.

description.zh: 混沌是一种神秘却常见的现象，大量的无序中竟然能涌现出秩序。我对此深深着迷，自己动手做了一个小实验。
description.en: Order from disorder. A visual experiment exploring the mesmerizing and counterintuitive world of chaotic systems.

description.zh: 我是个IE6时代的上古前端，把一些用到过的效果与技巧集中起来，分类整理，供自己学习练习用。代码混乱，略邋遢，请慎入~
description.en: A 'dinosaur' developer's sandbox. A messy collection of experimental frontend tricks from someone who survived the IE6 era. Enter at your own risk~
